description: For tasks that ask an agent to produce original content — copy, articles, scripts, messaging. Used across marketing, sales, design, academic, and support.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.description: Content is tailored to the stated audience, channel, and context — not generic content that would apply to any brand or situation.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.description: Claims are accurate, tone matches the stated brand voice, and no factual errors are present.

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.description: Content is ready to use or requires only minor editing — not a draft that needs substantial rewriting.

dimensions.name: domain_signal
dimensions.description: Writing demonstrates real domain knowledge — e.g. a B2B SaaS email uses appropriate conversion framing, an academic abstract follows the correct structural conventions.
